name: Symptoms started weeks after ladder fall at work, too late?
description: File anyway; delays often accepted with proof.

mainEntity.name: Symptoms started weeks after ladder fall at work, too late?

acceptedAnswer.text: File anyway; delays often accepted with proof.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**No, file now; explain delay due to swelling or minor initial pain.**

Good cause extends if reasonable. Medical links needed.

- Doctor opines on causation.
- Common in soft tissue.
- Commissions flexible.[1]

Act fast; evidence fades.
